form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after eight months second last of 8 at Launceston Mdn-Sw on March 20 over 1200m, 6 len behind Dubai Affair with 58.5kg at $71. Previously second-up 6th of 9 at Devonport Synthetic Mdn-Sw on January 8 2025 over 1009m, 4.5 len behind Getcha Groove On with 56.5kg at $101. No easier this time and is likely to struggle.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Jumped awkwardly and slow to muster. Raced wide from the 800m to the 400m.

Near the 1000m, brushed by Arcade Boy.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of nine weeks. Finished off last preparation eighth of 14 at this track Mdn/Cl1-Sw February 8 over 1600m, soft track; 7 len behind Kiss My Rock with 57kg at $101. Previously first up; seventh of 14 at this track Mdn-Sw January 18 over 1600m, soft track; 5 len behind Alpine Honey carrying 58.5kg at $9.50. Might need a run or two.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped on jumping. Raced four wide from the 800m.

Slow to begin. Tightened, approaching the 100m.

form.formComment: Had two starts to date. When well in the market at debut, led to the turn then faded second last of 9 at Launceston Mdn-Sw on March 4 over 1220m, on a slow track; 5.5 len behind Woolclasser carrying 58.5kg at $3.90. Second-up ran on from midfield; 2nd of 9 at Launceston Mdn-Sw on March 20 over 1400m, 0.5 len behind Genuine Lady with 58.5kg at $8.50. Winning chance.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. At the latest run rolled along in front then was edged out late 2nd in a small field at Launceston Mdn-Sw on March 27 over 1400m, slow going nose behind Team Heist with 56.5kg at $3.20. Before that 3rd in a small field at Launceston Mdn-Sw on March 13 over 1200m, slow going 1.5 len behind Windara Wolf carrying 54.5kg at $2.20. Go close.
